proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative effect).

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope of ecog_ps on pfs_months = -1.180 months per 1-unit ECOG (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with stage_iv = 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: stage_iv=1 -> 3.62; stage_iv=0 -> 5.15; difference = -1.54 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with has_brain_mets = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without brain metastases.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: brain_mets=1 -> 3.75; brain_mets=0 -> 4.80; difference = -1.05 months (p=1.45e-178).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with liver_mets = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without liver metastases.
Patients with bone_mets = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without bone metastases.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher C-reactive protein (crp_mg_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater 6-month weight loss percentage (weight_loss_pct_6mo) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with er_positive = 1 have longer mean pfs_months than er_positive = 0 patients overall.
Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have longer mean pfs_months than those not receiving tamoxifen overall.
There is a positive interaction between er_positive and treatment_tamoxifen on pfs_months: tamoxifen prolongs pfs_months more in ER+ patients than in ER- patients.

analyses.result_summary: ER+ tam=1 mean=4.88; ER+ tam=0 mean=4.86; ER- tam=1 mean=4.35; ER- tam=0 mean=4.27. Interaction beta=-0.058 (p=0.27).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between her2_positive and treatment_trastuzumab on pfs_months: trastuzumab prolongs pfs_months in HER2+ patients more than in HER2- patients.

analyses.result_summary: HER2+ trast=1 mean=4.25; HER2+ trast=0 mean=4.33; HER2- trast=1 mean=4.74; HER2- trast=0 mean=4.79. Interaction beta=-0.028 (p=0.695).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between BRCA1/2 mutation status (brca1_mutation OR brca2_mutation) and treatment_olaparib on pfs_months: olaparib prolongs pfs_months in BRCA-mutant patients more than in BRCA-wildtype patients.

analyses.result_summary: BRCA+ olap=1 mean=4.93; BRCA+ olap=0 mean=4.59; BRCA- olap=1 mean=4.65; BRCA- olap=0 mean=4.70. Interaction beta=0.402 (p=0.0208).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between her2_low and treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan on pfs_months: sacituzumab govitecan prolongs pfs_months more in HER2-low patients than in HER2-not-low patients.

analyses.result_summary: HER2-low sg=1 mean=4.74; HER2-low sg=0 mean=4.77; HER2-not-low sg=1 mean=4.66; HER2-not-low sg=0 mean=4.65. Interaction beta=-0.038 (p=0.626).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between er_positive and treatment_palbociclib on pfs_months: palbociclib prolongs pfs_months more in ER+ patients than in ER- patients.

analyses.result_summary: ER+ palbo=1 mean=5.89; ER+ palbo=0 mean=4.31; ER- palbo=1 mean=4.29; ER- palbo=0 mean=4.30. Interaction beta=1.594 (p=9.31e-229).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different mean pfs_months from those not receiving pembrolizumab (overall main effect).

There is a positive interaction between triple-negative status (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0) and treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months: pembrolizumab prolongs pfs_months more in TNBC than in non-TNBC patients.

analyses.result_summary: TNBC pembro=1 mean=4.37; TNBC pembro=0 mean=4.29; non-TNBC pembro=1 mean=4.70; non-TNBC pembro=0 mean=4.81. Interaction beta=0.185 (p=0.0152).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Larger tumor_size_cm is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Slope = 0.17592 months per year of age (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher ki67_pct (proliferation index) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with pleural_effusion = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Mean pfs_months differs between race_ethnicity = 'black' and race_ethnicity = 'white' patients (testing socio-demographic disparity).

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs_months between race_ethnicity black vs white

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months is shorter for uninsured patients (insurance_type = 'uninsured') than for privately insured patients (insurance_type = 'private').

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs_months between insurance_type uninsured vs private

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with pik3ca_mutation = 1 have different mean pfs_months than wild-type patients (overall main effect).
After adjusting for major prognostic covariates, higher ecog_ps remains independently associated with shorter pfs_months (negative adjusted slope).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + nlr + crp_mg_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + tumor_size_cm + ki67_pct + weight_loss_pct_6mo + prior_lines_of_therapy
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted ecog_ps slope = -1.166 (p=<1e-300). Full model: age_years: beta=0.1756 p=<1e-300; ecog_ps: beta=-1.1657 p=<1e-300; stage_iv: beta=-1.5509 p=<1e-300; has_brain_mets: beta=-0.9927 p=<1e-300; liver_mets: beta=0.0045 p=0.786; bone_mets: beta=0.0130 p=0.378; albumin_g_dl: beta=0.4842 p=<1e-300; ldh_u_l: beta=-0.0005 p=9.72e-14; nlr: beta=-0.0024 p=0.406; crp_mg_l: beta=0.0002 p=0.718; hemoglobin_g_dl: beta=0.0001 p=0.982; tumor_size_cm: beta=-0.0015 p=0.663; ki67_pct: beta=-0.0188 p=<1e-300; weight_loss_pct_6mo: beta=-0.0770 p=<1e-300; prior_lines_of_therapy: beta=0.0046 p=0.374.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the ER+ subgroup, after adjusting for age, ECOG, stage IV, HER2 status, and albumin, treatment_tamoxifen is independently associated with longer pfs_months (positive adjusted slope).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + treatment_tamoxifen + her2_positive + albumin_g_dl, restricted to er_positive=1

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the HER2+ subgroup, after adjusting for age, ECOG, stage IV, brain metastases, and albumin, treatment_trastuzumab is independently associated with longer pfs_months (positive adjusted slope).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + treatment_trastuzumab + albumin_g_dl, restricted to her2_positive=1

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the BRCA1/2-mutant subgroup, after adjusting for age, ECOG, stage IV, brain metastases, and albumin, treatment_olaparib is independently associated with longer pfs_months (positive adjusted slope).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + treatment_olaparib + albumin_g_dl, restricted to brca_any=1
